Welcome to Our
Family of Faith

A Humble Beginning

The spiritual journey of the Cologne Church began on April 16, 1995. Our beginning was humble, as we initially gathered in the homes of a few believers. Despite these small beginnings, our hunger for the Word of God was immense. This period of prayer and fellowship in homes laid the foundation for our growth. As God opened more doors, we transitioned to meeting in smaller halls.

The Evolution

From a Migrant Church to a Settled Community

In the early years of our history, our church primarily served as a spiritual haven for students and migrants who had come to Germany for studies or temporary stays. Many members would return to their home countries after completing their education, yet the church persisted in faithfully sowing the Word of God. Through God's grace, this dynamic has evolved over time. Today, our church has transformed into a stable and deep-rooted community of permanent residents. After 21 years of faithful fellowship, this stability led to our formal registration as Äthiopische Evangelische Gemeinde Köln Mühlheim e.V. at the District Court of Cologne (Amtsgericht Köln) under the registration number VR 19124 on November 24, 2016. This transition has provided the church with greater stability, expanded our ministries, and allowed us to build a strong foundation for the coming generation.

Official Registration

Nov 24, 2016 • VR 19124

Amtsgericht Köln

Perseverance Through Trials

The history of our church has not been without its challenges. Over the years, our journey has been marked by various obstacles and difficult circumstances. However, these trials served as tools to refine our faith and allow us to experience God’s faithfulness firsthand. Because the Lord has sustained us with His grace through every hurdle, our church stands today on a firm foundation.

Our Ministries Today

Today, the Cologne Church is active in various areas of ministry to strengthen the spiritual life of its members

Worship Ministry

Worship in spirit and truth that draws the hearts of believers closer to the Lord.

Word Ministry

Timely and life-changing biblical teachings.

In-depth Bible Study

Programs designed to help believers explore the Word of God and be deeply rooted in divine truth.

A little one shall become a thousand, and a small one a strong nation. I, the Lord, will hasten it in its time.

— Isaiah 60:22
